summary: Completed frontend testing of Starlink Multi-Account Management App. Backend APIs remain 100% functional. Critical session persistence issue identified that prevents comprehensive testing of all features. Core login and dashboard functionality working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Critical session persistence failure - users get redirected to login page after navigation between pages

integration_issues.issue: Session expires or is not properly maintained during page navigation, causing automatic logout

passed_tests: Dashboard stats display correctly (Total Accounts: 1, Online: 1, Offline: 0, Open Tickets: 1)
Accounts page loads when accessed directly after login
Filter functionality works (can filter by Online status)
UI layout and design appear correct
Backend API endpoints (21/21 tests passed - confirmed via backend_test.py)
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix session persistence issue. Users are being redirected to login page when navigating between pages (e.g., Dashboard -> Accounts). This prevents testing of account creation, account detail page, device management, payment recording, and ticket management features. Investigate JWT token storage, session management, and authentication state persistence in the frontend.

success_percentage.frontend: 40% (core login and dashboard working, but session persistence blocks most functionality)
